title: Resolve PatternStore silent-failure: surface or remove lastError
summary: Resolved PatternStore's silent failure state by removing the unsurfaced lastError property and logging refresh/digest-generation failures through PerformanceTelemetry.notice. No user-visible copy was added because PatternStore refresh runs from lifecycle hooks and pattern/digest data is optional.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17,OS=26.5' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-patternstore-build

contract_status_changes.before: PatternStore set lastError strings that no view observed, so failures looked handled in application state but were effectively dead UI state.
contract_status_changes.after: PatternStore no longer exposes dead lastError state; refresh and digest-generation failures are diagnostic-only telemetry notices.

not_claimed: A new retry affordance for digest generation.
Changes to PatternEngine or WeeklyDigestRules behavior.
residual_risks: Users still do not receive a visible error when optional pattern data fails to refresh. This is intentional for this slice because the failure is lifecycle-triggered and not clearly user-actionable.
Telemetry-only diagnostics depend on OSLog availability.
recommended_next_reason: It is the remaining queued follow-up from the error-message audit.
